---
title: "Data Validation Report"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-06"
---
## Executive Summary

This report provides an automated audit of the CDISC Pilot Study data (Xanomeline in Alzheimer's Disease). The objective is to verify that the analysis-ready datasets (ADaM) maintain strict traceability and logical consistency with the raw tabulation data (SDTM), as required by **ICH E6 (GCP)** and **ICH E9 (Statistical Principles)**.

```{r dashboard_kpis, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

# Ingest the summary matrix generated by scripts/03_validation.R
audit_data <- readRDS("../data/outputs/audit_summary.rds")
pass_rate <- ((audit_data$total_subjects - audit_data$missing_dm_count) / audit_data$total_subjects) * 100

# Simple summary table
kpi_df <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Total Randomized Subjects", "Pre-Consent Event Flags", "Cross-Domain Synchronization"),
  Value = c(as.character(audit_data$total_subjects), as.character(audit_data$pre_consent_count), paste0(round(pass_rate, 1), "%")),
  Status = c("Verified", 
             ifelse(audit_data$pre_consent_count == 0, "PASS", "CHECK"), 
             ifelse(pass_rate == 100, "PASS", "FAIL")),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

kpi_df %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "Clinical Data Quality Dashboard") %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = everything()) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#e8f5e9"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = Status == "PASS")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#ffebee"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = Status %in% c("CHECK", "FAIL"))
  )
